_comment: Priority video queue for AlwaysReady Care YouTube Shorts. distribute.py drains this before falling back to generic autopilot. Edit freely; re-order as priorities change.
_format: Each entry → one YouTube Short. 'status': pending | rendered | uploaded | failed. 'tool' = local URL path used by render-batch.js --tool flag. Metadata used for YouTube title/desc/tags.
